falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear breakout above a key resistance level would invalidate the 'bottom' pattern and suggest continued bullish momentum, contradicting the HOLD signal.
A blowoff score above 60 indicates extreme market stress, which would contradict the current pattern's 38 score and suggest a different (more volatile) outcome than the current UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Federal Reserve announces a 100-basis-point rate cut within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a drastic policy shift would inject massive liquidity, invalidating the current HOLD signal by creating conditions contrary to the bottom pattern's assumptions.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
